articles.title: AMERICA'S LITHIUM HOTSPOT. NOW THEY'VE GOT A NEW NEIGHBOR
articles.summary: EnergyX just secured rights to 35,000 acres of lithium-rich land in Arkansas beside Exxon and Chevron. But land is only part of the story. EnergyX's patented technology can recover up to 3X more lithium than traditional methods, positioning it as a leading vertically integrated U.S. producer. Backed by General Motors, Eni, and POSCO, momentum is building fast.

articles.title: TERRAFORM LABS SUES JANE STREET FOR INSIDER TRADING PRIOR TO TERRA COLLAPSE
articles.summary: Terraform Labs' liquidation administrator has filed a lawsuit against Jane Street and several employees, alleging they used non-public information from Terraform insiders to front-run trades during the Terra-Luna collapse in 2022 that destroyed over $40 billion in value. The complaint cites a wallet linked to Jane Street that withdrew 85 million TerraUSD from Curve within 10 minutes of Terraform's unannounced 150 million withdrawal on May 7, 2022, and claims Jane Street planted a former Terraform employee to establish insider communication channels. The lawsuit also connects to the administrator's filing against Jump Trading for $4 billion in damages in December, which alleges that Jump leaked information to Jane Street. Jane Street disputes the claims as "opportunistic."

articles.title: BINANCE DENIES FIRING INVESTIGATORS AFTER REPORTED $1.7B IRAN TRANSFERS
articles.summary: Binance has disputed reports that it fired investigators who uncovered roughly $1.7 billion in crypto flows to Iran-linked entities, saying no one was dismissed for raising compliance concerns. Its internal review found no sanctions violations, and it has sharply reduced direct exposure to Iranian exchanges, even as the media reports allege internal discipline, probe dismantling, and continued scrutiny after documents tied funds to Iran-linked wallets.

articles.title: NEAR LAUNCHES SUPER APP WITH AI CAPABILITIES AND PRIVATE TRANSACTIONS
articles.summary: NEAR Protocol has launched Near.com, a consumer super app designed for the agentic era. Its features include AI-driven transaction automation and a confidential mode for private on-chain activity. The app simplifies asset management by removing gas fees and private key complexities for users.

articles.title: MOONPAY LAUNCHES THE ONRAMP FOR THE AGENT ECONOMY
GOLDEN PATH
articles.summary: Crypto has lost its philosophical purpose by celebrating institutional adoption while abandoning its core mission of resisting centralization and preserving individual sovereignty. There are three possible futures – TradFi absorption, government surrender to permissionless systems, or an uneasy coexistence as a parallel walled-off system – with the latter as crypto's "Golden Path." Users should embrace inconvenience as the cost of sovereignty by prioritizing algorithmic stablecoins, enabling privacy, and building censorship-resistant infrastructure that rejects dependence on fiat ramps and centralized chokepoints.

articles.title: HOW TO FIX TOKENS
articles.summary: Most tokens fail because they incentivize selling over holding, and one fix is giving token holders direct control over 100% of protocol revenue through governance votes on distribution versus reinvestment. This model hasn't been adopted due to insider profitability from token sales and securities law concerns, but a current regulatory window with the SEC's Crypto Task Force under Hester Peirce is exploring registration frameworks and safe harbors. There is urgency for protocols like Aave, Morpho, and Uniswap already merging equity and token holders to proactively demonstrate viable models before the window closes at midterms.

articles.title: THE QUIET CRYPTO INTEGRATION
articles.summary: Blockchain is becoming the foundational infrastructure for fintech, driven by institutional adoption from BlackRock and Apollo. Legislation like the CLARITY Act validates this shift. Tokenized money market funds and stablecoins now provide efficient, 24/7 alternatives to traditional rails, forcing incumbents to innovate or face obsolescence.

articles.title: FROM “CRYPTO AI” TO GENERAL: AI AGENTS DREAM OF ELECTRIC LANGOUSTINES?
articles.summary: Agentic commerce leverages x402 pay-per-call protocols and ERC-8004 identity registries to enable autonomous machine-to-machine markets. Frameworks like OpenClaw and DayDreams allow agents to discover, fund, and provide services using stablecoins. This infrastructure supports independent micro-businesses.

articles.title: WHY PRIVACY MATTERS MORE THAN EVER IN 2026
articles.summary: Public blockchains expose user balances and behaviors, driving a shift toward privacy-centric infrastructure.

articles.title: BALAJI ON CRYPTO AS A CODE-BASED ORDER
articles.summary: Crypto's purpose is building a code-based order to replace the collapsing rules-based international order, guaranteeing property rights, smart contracts, privacy, and identity across borders even in the face of debanking and denaturalization.

articles.title: BITCOIN TESTS $63K AS CRYPTO SENTIMENT FALLS TO “EXTREME FEAR”
articles.summary: Bitcoin fell below $63,000 amid “extreme fear” as macro headlines and thin liquidity drove a 3 to 4% pullback.

articles.title: POLYMARKET PRICES METEORA AS TOP SUSPECT IN INSIDER TRADING PROBE
articles.summary: Polymarket traders are pricing Meteora as the leading suspect in ZachXBT's upcoming insider-trading investigation.
